zh.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood是Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood和Margaret Gray的女兒，於1430年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德。她於1441年之前與Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年6月25日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾斯圖亞頓享年43歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Mariotta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Maria , now occasionally used as a given name in the English-speaking world. In Gaelic Scotland Mar(i)etta is sometimes found as an Anglicized form of Mairead, the Gaelic equivalent of Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood was born in 1430, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the daughter of Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood and Margaret Gray. She married Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock before 1441, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 25 June 1473, in Stewarton, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood est née en 1430, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fille de Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood et Margaret Gray. Elle a épousé Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock avant 1441, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juin 1473, à Stewarton, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood wurde 1430 in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood und Margaret Gray geboren. Sie hat vor 1441 in Scotland Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juni 1473 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Stewarton, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwoodは1430年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカルデルウッドでSir John Maxwell of CalderwoodとMargaret Grayの娘として生まれた。1441年以前にスコットランドでRobert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年6月25日にイギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアステワートンで43歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 1430년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood(와)과 Margaret Gray의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1441년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 6월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 스튜아르턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood nasceu em 1430, em Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland filha de Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood e Margaret Gray. Ela casou-se com Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock antes 1441, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de junho de 1473, em Stewarton, East Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood родилась в 1430 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood и Margaret Gray. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock перед 1441 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 25 июня 1473 г. в местности стюартон, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
